query: Segment all small-vehicles and get the pixel count for each segmented small vehicle. Calculate the total real-world area they cover in square meters and then determine the mean footprint per vehicle. GSD: 0.125783611073 m/pixel
final_answer:
Pixel counts per vehicle: [586, 465, 562, 795, 823, 823]
 Total pixel count: 4054 px
 Total real-world area: 64.17 m sq
 Mean footprint per vehicle: 10.69 m sq

evaluation.question: Is the total pixel count within the acceptable range of 3648.6 to 4459.4 pixels?
Is the total real-world area within the acceptable range of 57.75 to 70.59 m sq?
Is the mean footprint per vehicle within the acceptable range of 9.62 to 11.76 m sq ?
